response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering capabilities with 15+ years of experience and strong practices in testing and code quality, he lacks nearly all domain-specific requirements for this embedded networking security role. Most critically, he lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (a stated requirement), and his career has focused on full-stack web/mobile platforms rather than embedded firmware development. No evidence of experience with networking technologies, security protocols, LAN-switch products, or Linux kernel work at the depth required.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development experience across multiple platforms and languages, including C and embedded systems
Demonstrated mastery of software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and creation of testing frameworks
Full-stack engineering capabilities with ability to investigate and implement across multiple technology domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with networking protocols (Layer 2/3), security technologies (encryption, authentication, attack detection), or LAN-switch products
Missing native-level Japanese language proficiency, listed as a required qualification—this is typically a disqualifying gap
Career trajectory shows specialization in web/mobile platforms and AI infrastructure, not embedded firmware development or kernel-level work
